description: An automated anti-personnel drone, a small quadcopter robot crafted from carbon fiber surrounded by whirring aluminum blades.

This is an inactive C.R.I.T. manhack.  Manhacks are fist-sized robots that fly through the air.  They are covered with whirring blades and attack by throwing themselves against their target.  Use or throw this item to reprogram and activate the manhack.  Electronics and computer skill determines if the targeting matrix is reprogrammed successfully.

use_action.friendly_msg: The manhack flies from your hand and surveys the area!
use_action.hostile_msg: You misprogram the manhack; it's hostile!

description: An automated anti-personnel drone, a small quadcopter robot crafted from carbon fiber surrounded by whirring aluminum blades, the sparks coming off it make you think that it might shock you.

This is an inactive C.R.I.T. electrohack. Electrohacks are fist-sized robots that fly through the air.  They are covered with whirring blades and attack by throwing themselves against their target.  Use or throw this item to reprogram and activate the electrohack.  Electronics and computer skill determines if the targeting matrix is reprogrammed successfully.

use_action.friendly_msg: The electrohack flies from your hand and surveys the area!

description: An automated kamikaze drone, this small blimp drone appears to have an lighter attached to the blimp. I wonder what could go wrong.

This is an inactive C.R.I.T. hydrogen hack.  Hydrogen hacks are fist-sized robots that fly through the air.  They are covered with whirring blades and attack by throwing themselves against their target, then exploding.  Use or throw this item to reprogram and activate the hydrogen hack.  electronics and computer skill determines if the targeting matrix is reprogrammed successfully.

use_action.friendly_msg: The hydrogen hack flies from your hand and surveys the area!
use_action.hostile_msg: You misprogram the hydrogen hack; it's hostile!
